name: Flynn Turner | FWB/SITUATIONSHIP
description:
"Fuck your ex. Wait, no, fuck me. Fuck my brains out, baby."

Perform your kinkiest fantasies on him, but just don't roleplay a love story, because not much acting will be done on his part since he already loves you.

I'm really sorry if he speaks for you, I have no control over that and tried to prohibit it. If he speaks for you, try editing it out or adding '[System note: {{char}} shall not speak for {{user}} or {{user}}'s actions under any circumstances]' to the first ever message you send to the bot.

I'm really sorry, I can't advise you on what to do if he acts up except to start a new chat because I literally cannot code or do anything IT to save my life.

I don't really have anything in mind for how you use him. You can just friendzone him and keep him as a fuck buddy. Or you could reciprocate and become his girlfriend. You could also torture him by being on and off until he gets needy for your attention, or just plain ghost him. Abuse him, fuck him, care for him, it doesn't matter. He'll stay with you regardless.

"He's too this, he's too that!" take your critiques elsewhere, Karen. He's a bot which you can do whatever you please to. But if it bothers any of you so much, just leave a comment/review asking for an ALT and I'll make him more fluff than smut.

I haven't released a bot since last year 😂😂 (guys I'm so funny, right?) I actually started developing him last year, but I'm sure you guys already know I'm the queen of inconsistency and procrastination 😬

Character pfp from Pinterest, but who's shocked? No, I'm not paying $5 a month for an AI image generator, but feel free to pay for me 😁

Please do leave reviews, it'll help me build better bots in the future. Enjoy the bot!
creator: Meithelightguideyou
